title: JasonTheWeen, Marlon, StableRonaldo under fire for running red light and stop sign on stream
summary_full: Popular streamers JasonTheWeen, Marlon, and StableRonaldo are facing backlash after a clip showed them disregarding traffic laws on motorized two-wheelers. The video captured them running a red light and failing to fully stop at a stop sign, with viewers also noting the absence of helmets. This incident has ignited discussions about streamer accountability and road safety.
